name: email.draft
description: Queue an email draft for your approval. NEVER sends automatically. The draft is held in the Parawi approval queue until you explicitly approve it. Requires a linked Google account.

message.description: Natural language draft request, e.g. 'draft a reply to the Leidos recruiter saying I am still interested'

examples: draft a reply to the recruiter saying I'm still interested
write an email to the hiring manager at Booz Allen thanking them for the interview
compose a follow-up to the Amazon recruiter I spoke with last week
